text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Lucky Umamusume Race is about<n>to start!
Every New Year, this tradition<n>attracts many
fleet-footed runners,<n>and this year is no different.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have a guest runner<n>from Tracen
Academy this year as<n>well. Let's give her a huge
round of<n>applause, everyone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha ha! Rejoice, one and<n>all! For this
year, the one and only<n>T.M. Opera O is gracing the
stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How fortuitous you are to be in my<n>presence, for
today, you shall bear<n>witness to the moment that
I—blessed<n>as I am—become the Lucky
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's T.M. Opera O! This might<n>be the year a
guest runner wins first<n>place!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's not happening. Guest<n>runners are
always marked by all of<n>the runners, putting them
at a<n>disadvantage. Plus they aren't used<n>to the
course...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Besides, she's here again thisyear! From what I heard, she's beentraining for this race specifically. Oooh,I just know she's going to give us agood show!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Sorry to rain on the parade, but<n>you might
as well forfeit, because<n>victory is going to be mine
again this<n>year!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, now! She must be quite skillful<n>to be so
confident!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A worthy opponent takes the stage...<n>Very well! I
never hold back in a race,<n>and this one will be no
exception!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly between the two<n>contenders! The sharp
crack of the<n>starter pistol echoes in the chilly
winter air.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Under the watchful eyes of the crowd<n>lined up
along the route, the leader of<n>the pack comes into
view...

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
At the head of the pack is last year's<n>Lucky
Umamusume! Can she hold<n>onto her lead?! It
looks like T.M.<n>Opera O is hot on her heels!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I have you now, myworthy opponent!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Ow! My toe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Sniff... It hurts, but... I'm fine. So go!You're gonna lose if you don't hurryup and run!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehehehe... Haaah ha ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You're worrying about others even in<n>the midst of
your own pain? What a<n>beautiful, noble heart you
have!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But fret not. It will take more than a<n>brief pause to
snatch victory's crown<n>from my brow!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I leave this child in your<n>capable hands!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: YAAAH!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what's this?! T.M. Opera O has<n>taken the
lead! She's broken straight<n>through the pack with
a powerful<n>burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
And with a huge lead, T.M. Opera O<n>clinches the
race and becomes this<n>year's Lucky
Umamusume! We've<n>just witnessed the
ascension of the<n>Centurial Lucky Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha ha! Everyone! Say<n>hello to this
year's Lucky<n>Umamusume—yours truly!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You were amazing! I wanna be<n>able to run
just like you someday!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Well, that's a most<n>worthy and
natural goal, given my<n>outstanding comeback!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Not only did she stop to help a child,<n>but she even
won the race... I've<n>been utterly defeated. It looks
like I<n>have a ways to go...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You put up a valiant fight. A<n>protagonist shines
only vis-à-vis a<n>worthy rival. You deserve the
award<n>for the best supporting role!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Congratulations, Centurial<n>Lucky
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come one, come all for a high five<n>from me! Allow
me to share my luck<n>with everyone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha ha! Haaaaah ha ha<n>ha ha!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Will you look at that! It's T.M. Opera<n>O! T.M. Opera
O has made her way to<n>the front! Aaaaand the two
of them<n>cross the finish line simultaneously!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
A performance worthy of the fastest<n>semi-pro!
She didn't give an inch this<n>year either, folks! And
coming in at a<n>close second is T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! I was a mere step away from<n>victory... Is this
yet another ordeal one<n>must face to become the
top star?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text:
Opera O... You were so cool! I've<n>never seen
anyone run like you do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? Hehe! If I was able to<n>put a smile on
your face, then it was<n>all worth it! I must commend
myself<n>on a job well done!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...I won. I'm this year's LuckyUmamusume, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your win! Your<n>display of
strength was worthy of<n>illuminating my grand
stage!

text_block_list.name: Semi-Pro Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on... You're too earnest for<n>your own
good. You helped that kid<n>and still managed to
make an<n>amazing play for first place... You're<n>so
cool it almost hurts.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But of course I am! I'm<n>guessing by your
words that you too<n>have fallen for my charms.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
To think I would be able to capture<n>hearts even in
defeat... Goodness!<n>Does my glamour know no
limit?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The title of Lucky Umamusume has<n>slipped
through T.M. Opera O's<n>fingers, but her gallantry
ensures that<n>she gleams brighter than any star in
the sky!
